---
name: "Add a country"
about: "Propose adding a new country to the Pipeline"
title: "Add country: [COUNTRY NAME]"
labels: ["new-country", "help wanted"]
---

## Country

**Country name:**
**ISO code (2-letter):**
**Primary language(s):**

## Your situation

- [ ] I have personally relocated to this country, or am in the process of doing so
- [ ] I am willing to maintain content accuracy for at least 6 months after merge
- [ ] I can read the relevant official government sources in the local language

## Coverage scope (check what you can cover)

- [ ] Visa / residency pathways (equivalent to Stage 1)
- [ ] Document preparation — apostilles, translations (Stage 2)
- [ ] Border / arrival procedure (Stage 3)
- [ ] Core registrations — tax number, address, bank, health insurance (Stage 4)
- [ ] Business structures and tax optimization (Stage 5)

## Official sources you'll use

List the primary government sources for each area — ministry of interior, tax authority, health insurance body, etc.

## Notes

Any known complexity: unusual visa categories, mandatory local language for filings, etc.

---

> **Before starting a fork:** read [`CONTRIBUTING-i18n.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING-i18n.md) for the data/strings split and the skeleton YAML files under [`data/stages/`](../../data/stages/). The easiest start is to copy an existing country's YAML and adapt source URLs, dates, and checklist items.
